name: Fig Newtons # 4
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine figs, sugar, water and lemon juice. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture is thick and jam-like. Cool.
2. In a bowl, combine shortening, brown sugar, eggs, and vanilla. Stir in flour, soda and salt. Turn dough out onto a heavily floured surface and knead a few times to make a smooth ball.
3. With a floured rolling pin, roll the dough out to a 14 x 12-inch rectangle. Cut the dough into 4 strips, each 3 1/2 inches wide and 12 inches long.
4. Spoon filling in a mound down the center of each strip. Using a spatula, turn in the sides of each strip to enclose the filling.
5. Press edges together and turn the strip seam side down. With a sharp knife, cut each strip into 10 pieces.
6. Place on greased baking sheets and bake at 375 degrees for 10 - 12 minutes, or until fig newtons are puffed and firm to the touch. Cool on a rack and store in an airtight container in a cool dry place. Makes 40.
